name: polygraph
description: A polygraph for your state machine: an LLM derives a bare next(state, action, data) spec from your code, then Polygraph replays real traces against it (conformance) AND model-checks it against invariants (finds bugs by exhaustive iteration). Also includes polygen: author NEW verifiable code from a feature description.

scripts.verify:turnstile: node scripts/verify.mjs --contract examples/turnstile/contract.json --traces examples/turnstile/traces --specs examples/turnstile/specs --out examples/turnstile/out
